---
title: "master_thesis_visualizations"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r, load packages and working directory}

# data import and database management 
# reading files, reshaping data, and efficient data handling 

#######################################################

library(readxl) # import excel spreadsheets
library(data.table) #quick manipulation of large datasets
library(stringr) # text and string processing 
library(lubridate) # data and time handling 
library(writexl) # exports editted databases into excel files

#######################################################

# General data science workflow 
# Collection of packages for data manipulation and plotting

#######################################################

library(tidyverse)

#######################################################

#Statistical analyses and mixed models 
# Hypothesis testing, summaries, and model fitting 

#######################################################

library(gt) # displaying formatted tables for statistics 
library(rstatix) # statistical tests and assumption checking
library(lmerTest) # p-values and tests for lme4 models 
library(lme4) # linear and generalized mixed-effects models
library(ggeffects) # predicted values and marginal effects 

#######################################################

# Data visualization 
# Plot creation, figure assembly, and publication formatting 

#######################################################

library(patchwork) #comvine ggplots into multi-panel figures
library(cowplot) # figure arrangement and plot annotations
library(rcartocolor) # color palettes
library(ggh4x) # advanced ggplot extensions
library(scales) # axis labels, formatting, and scaling 

#######################################################
# Spatial data and mapping 
# GIS data handling and map visualization
#######################################################

library(sf) #spatial vector data
library(ggmap) #basemaps and geographic visualization
library(ggspatial) #spatial annotations and map elements
library(leaflet) #interactive web maps

#######################################################

#Tables and report outputs 
# Interactive tables and report presentation 

#######################################################

library(reactable) #interactive tables for reports

#######################################################
# R markdown and document rendering 
# PDF generation and LaTeX support 
#######################################################

library(tinytex) #LaTeX engine for PDF knitting
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r, working directory and master data file}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')


# Deposition alone 

master_thesis <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")

# Reassign factors to appropriate variables 

master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 
                                             format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field,            
                                                format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Study.Phase <- factor(master_thesis$Study.Phase, levels = c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4", "M5", "M6","M7", "M8", "M9", "M10", "M11", "M12"))
master_thesis$Site <- as.factor(master_thesis$Site)
master_thesis$Tran <- as.factor(master_thesis$Tran)
master_thesis$Dist <- as.factor(master_thesis$Dist)
master_thesis$Replicate<- as.factor(master_thesis$Replicate)
master_thesis$Year<- as.factor(master_thesis$Year)
master_thesis$Flux <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Flux)
#master_thesis$Phen_Period <- factor(master_thesis$Phen_Period, levels = c("Late_Dry\n(Months 1-3)", "Tran\n(Months 4-6)", "Wet\n(Months 7-9)", "Growth\n(Months 10-12)"))
master_thesis$marsh_edge_type <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_edge_type)
master_thesis$marsh_orientation <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_orientation)
master_thesis$Marsh_Area <- as.factor(master_thesis$Marsh_Area)


```

```{r, aggregate per Replicates-Distances}

ggplot(
  master_thesis,
  aes(
    Dist,
    Flux
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal()

dist_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  group_by(Site, Dist) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

```

```{r, aggregate per Study.Phase-Site-Tran}

total_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  group_by(
    Site,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
ggplot(
  total_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )    .groups = "drop"
  )


```

```{r, aggregate per Marsh Edge Type}


edge_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  group_by(marsh_edge_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n())
  )

ggplot(edge_summary,
       aes(marsh_edge_type, mean_flux)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  )

```

```{r, aggregate per Marsh Edge Orientation}

orien_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  group_by(marsh_orientation) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n())
  )

ggplot(orien_summary,
       aes(marsh_orientation, mean_flux)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  )

```

```{r, aggregate per Marsh Area}

ma_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  group_by(Marsh_Area) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n())
  )

ggplot(ma_summary,
       aes(Marsh_Area, mean_flux)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  )

```

```{r, Study Phase}

phase_compare <- master_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Marsh_Group = case_when(
      Site %in% c("San Pablo", "Corte Madera") ~ "San Pablo + Corte Madera",
      Site %in% c("Buck's Landing", "Giant Marsh") ~ "Buck's Landing + Giant Marsh",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Marsh_Group)) %>%
  group_by(Marsh_Group, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

phase_compareplot = ggplot(
  phase_compare,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Marsh_Group,
    group = Marsh_Group
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Marsh Group"
  )

phase_compareplot 


phase_compare_noGM1 <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(!(Site == "GiantMarsh" & Tran == "2")) %>%
  group_by(
    Site,
    Tran,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  phase_compare,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Transect"
  )
```

```{r}

site_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n())
  )

ggplot(site_summary,
       aes(Site, mean_flux)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  )

```

```{r}

transect_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Flux = ifelse(Flux < 0, 0, Flux)
  ) %>%
  filter(Tran %in% c("1", "2")) %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Site,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  transect_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Site"
  )




transect_summary2 <- master_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Flux = ifelse(Flux < 0, 0, Flux)
  ) %>%
  filter(Dist %in% c("0.5", "2", "6", "12", "18", "24", "48")) %>%
  group_by(
    Dist,
    Site,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  transect_summary2,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Dist, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Distance",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Study Phase"
  )


master_thesis$Dist <- factor(
  master_thesis$Dist,
  levels = c("0.5", "2", "6", "12", "18", "24", "48")
)

transect_summary2 <- master_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Flux_zeroed = ifelse(Flux < 0, 0, Flux)
  ) %>%
  filter(Dist %in% c("0.5", "2", "6", "12", "18", "24", "48")) %>%
  group_by(Dist, Site, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dist_plot_log <- ggplot(
  transect_summary2,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = pmax(mean_flux - se_flux, 0.001),
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Dist, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Sediment Flux Across Study Phase by Distance from Marsh Edge",
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero; y-axis shown on log scale",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Site"
  )

dist_plot_log


transect_summary_no_giant <- master_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Flux_zeroed = ifelse(Flux < 0, 0, Flux)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    Site != "Giant Marsh",
    Dist %in% c("0.5", "2", "6", "12", "18", "24", "48")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Dist, Site, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dist_plot_no_giant <- ggplot(
  transect_summary_no_giant,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Dist, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Sediment Flux Across Study Phase by Distance from Marsh Edge",
    subtitle = "GiantMarsh removed; negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Site"
  )

dist_plot_no_giant

ggsave(
  "distance_flux_log_plot.png",
  dist_plot_log,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}

# all the sites 

hydro_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  mutate(
    Flux_zeroed = ifelse(Flux < 0, 0.001, Flux)
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    Hydro_Period,
    Site
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hydro_plot_log <- ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Hydro_Period,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = pmax(mean_flux - se_flux, 0.001),
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period",
    subtitle = "Log-scaled y-axis",
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Site"
  )

hydro_plot_log


# remove giant marsh 

hydro_summary_no_giant <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(Site != "Giant Marsh") %>%
  mutate(
    Flux_zeroed = ifelse(Flux < 0, 0, Flux)
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    Hydro_Period,
    Site
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux_zeroed, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


hydro_plot_no_giant <- ggplot(
  hydro_summary_no_giant,
  aes(
    x = Hydro_Period,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Site,
    group = Site
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period",
    subtitle = "GiantMarsh removed",
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Site"
  )

hydro_plot_no_giant

# faceted by site 

hydro_plot_facet <- ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Hydro_Period,
    y = mean_flux,
    group = 1
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Site,
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period",
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

hydro_plot_facet
```
